name: bridge-your-copilot
description: Expose the VS Code Language Model API over localhost for Python tools and OpenAI-compatible clients.

commands.title: Bridge your Copilot: Copy Access Token
Bridge your Copilot: Copy Connection Info
Bridge your Copilot: Rotate Access Token
Bridge your Copilot: Reveal Model Details

bridgeYourCopilot.port.description: Localhost port used by the bridge server.

bridgeYourCopilot.host.description: Host interface bound by the bridge. Keep this on 127.0.0.1 unless you understand the security implications.

bridgeYourCopilot.modelFamily.description: Preferred Copilot model family selected when the server starts. When empty, the extension first tries GPT-5.1 mini aliases and then falls back to GPT-5 mini or the first available model.

bridgeYourCopilot.defaultInstruction.description: Optional instruction prepended as a user message to every request.

bridgeYourCopilot.authToken.description: Optional shared secret override. When empty, the extension generates and stores a local token for you.

scripts.check: node --check src/extension.js && node --check src/http-handler.js && node --check src/model-selection.js && env PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp python3 -m py_compile bridge_your_copilot/__init__.py bridge_your_copilot/client.py bridge_your_copilot/cli.py
